title: These Sound Waves Put Out Fire
description:
These are sound waves putting out a fire and they’re being used to protect homes! 

Fire needs 3 ingredients: Fuel, heat, and oxygen. Sound waves disrupt fire by pushing and pulling the oxygen molecules away from the fuel. 

This team is working on scaling up the tech for homes and making a backpack version for first responders!

For more optimistic science and tech stories subscribe! 

#sound #fire #science #tech #shorts
